name: Compu-Tron x3000
short_description: Compu-Tron x3000 presents an alternate history and a short narrative mystery to be uncovered. Presented as a re-creation of a 1982 digital and educational assistant, delve into the records to uncover the mystery behind C. Tech Industries and Compu-Tron x3000.
detailed_description:
Compu-Tron x3000 presents an alternate history and a narrative mystery to be uncovered.

In 1982, leading technology company C. Tech Industries released Compu-Tron x3000 (UK Edition) - a home computing assistant centred on education and utility applications.

Explore the features of this (at the time) ground-breaking application and see if you can uncover the mystery of what happened to C. Tech Industries. Where did they go? Why did they disappear? And who is D.A.V.E.?

Features

  • Utilities: Calculation and Conversion Apps
  • Utilities: 5-Day UK Weather Forecast App
  • Education: UK History Timeline of Events
  • Education: Learn about The Solar System
  • Education: Learn about the Periodic Table of Elements
  • Games: A small selection of games to play with Compu-Tron
  • Mystery! Uncover the secrets behind C. Tech Industries and D.A.V.E.
